summary: Respond to autonomy prune cadence alert and schedule the next mirror drill

steps.title: Review cadence receipt and scope pruning work
steps.notes: Cadence report flagged module growth (+14 modules) and missing prior prune; manually re-counted autonomy modules to confirm signal, removed legacy health/audit shims to drop to +12, and captured per-file metrics for review.

steps.title: Draft pruning + mirror drill execution tasks
steps.notes: Opened queue/072-autonomy-hygiene-prune.md capturing module delta, prioritised coordinator_* consolidation and flagged need for pre-prune review before touching code.

steps.title: Run mirror drill and capture receipts
steps.notes: Executed drill per docs/workflow/mirror-drill.md: reran cadence summary, validated plan, refreshed brief artifacts, and logged risks/follow-ups for pruning.

checkpoint.description: Mirror drill receipt captured and pruning actions committed
